channel.title: personal on khalid.se
channel.description: Recent content in personal on khalid.se

item.title: About me
item.description: I am a IT and security manager at an international NGO in Sweden, and this is where I publish works of intrest and do some crazy experimentation behind the scenes. As I don’t participate in big tech social media, this is where I have my presence. What I like doing Link to heading Working out Sustainable living Hiking and being in nature Advocate for digital privacy Solving old and new problems in creative ways What I’m doing now Link to heading Some of my projects are listed here, this section is updated quaterly

item.title: Contact
item.description: You are welcome to reach out to me on the following links: 🧑🏽‍💻 Github 🧑🏽‍💼 LinkedIn 🐘 Mastodon 💬 Matrix: @khalid:data.haus 🦜 Snikket / XMPP: talk2me@chat.khalid.se 📧 Email: khalid-se.br9ty[at]slmail.me
